title: Prenatal Evaluation - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Prenatal Evaluation 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH HOOD RIVER CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy. Prenatal care and postpartum services, including pregnancy education, breastfeeding and breast pump support/teaching. Mental health support and family planning services offered. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH THE DALLES CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy.
